title: worktree_untracked event payload
$comment: Class: OPTIONAL_SPEC_ID. Records an operator-requested control-plane release where CAWS stops tracking a registered worktree but deliberately preserves the physical git worktree directory for inspection. Distinct from worktree_destroyed, which removes a live git worktree, and worktree_pruned, which repairs a ghost registry entry whose backing directory is already absent. UX-WORKTREE-UNTRACK-001.

worktree_name.description: Name of the untracked worktree registry entry.

reason.description: Human-readable operator reason for releasing the CAWS control-plane binding.

path.description: Physical git worktree directory that was preserved.

cleared_spec_binding.description: True when the matching spec worktree field was cleared as part of untrack.

spec_id.description: Optional: the spec id the registry entry claimed, when present.

owner_session_id.description: Optional: registered owner session id at the time the binding was released.
